articles.title: Home of the Week: Two-bedroom condo minutes from Roslindale Square for $575k
articles.description:
Its just steps from the Square with shops and restaurants, and a short walk from the MBTA’s Roslindale Village commuter rail stop.

The post Home of the Week: Two-bedroom condo minutes from Roslindale Square for $575k appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Explore a two-bedroom condo listed at $575,000 near Roslindale Square.
Condo is steps away from shops, restaurants, and the MBTA commuter rail.
Ideal location enhances accessibility for Boston residents seeking urban living.
